payload.label: pillow
payload.long_description: Off-white/cream rectangular fabric pillow (appears as the upper of a stacked pair) with visible seam and slight fraying along the lower edge; pillow looks flattened/soft and is partially cropped by the image border — close-up view approximately 0.5 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"pillow","short_description":"off-white rectangular pillow edge crop","long_description":"Off-white/cream rectangular fabric pillow (appears as the upper of a stacked pair) with visible seam and slight fraying along the lower edge; pillow looks flattened/soft and is partially cropped by the image border — close-up view approximately 0.5 m from the camera.","attributes":["off-white/cream color","rectangular shape","fabric (cotton/linen-like)","visible seam","frayed edge","flattened/compressed","stacked (upper pillow)","partial/cropped"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.5}
